## Purpose

## Process
### Functions
- `_redact(value)`: Per §47.6 + §76 Privacy · never leak secrets.
- `health()`: (no docstring)
- `view_settings()`: View current settings · admin only · secrets redacted.
- `reload_settings()`: Bust the LRU cache on get_settings · force re-read of env vars.
